windows.title: Intelli-Credit - AI-Powered Credit Appraisal & GST Compliance

bundle.shortDescription: AI-Powered Credit Appraisal & GST Compliance Platform
bundle.longDescription: Integrated credit assessment and GST compliance platform using Neo4j Knowledge Graphs. Automate Five C's credit analysis, detect shell companies, match GSTR-1 against GSTR-2B, and generate Credit Appraisal Memos with AI-powered risk explanations.
